# Live with Kevin Kelly on AI, humans and the future

**From:** "Azeem Azhar, Exponential View" <exponentialview@substack.com>
**Date:** 2025-03-07T18:25:05.000Z
**Folder:** exponential

---

View this post on the web at https://www.exponentialview.co/p/live-with-kevin-kelly-on-ai-humans

I was live with Kevin Kelly  earlier today. Thanks to all of you who joined us – and if you didn’t have a chance to join us live, you can watch the recording right here.
We discuss:
Population decline, its causes and implications.
How AI agents might eventually become integral economic entities, not only producing but also consuming, creating a new type of economy.
Why we both see technology not just as a complexity generator but as an opportunity and possibility enhancer.
How we could go about governing and incentivizing AI systems ethically – and whether they could surpass human morality standards.
Why Kevin believes in the universal right of mobility to encourage global competition for human talent and improve global well-being.
And in the end, I asked Kevin: If 1994 Kevin could read 2025 Kevin’s blog, what would blow his mind? I was surprised by his answer.
Enjoy!

Unsubscribe https://substack..yhRzE44sdek3WSUivzn5t11pdWOUvjOQTySTpSJ0PhA?
